title: Golden Delight Spinach Quesadilla
description: A delicious Mexican-inspired quesadilla filled with golden spinach and delight, perfect for a quick lunch or dinner.
instructions: Preheat a large skillet over medium heat.
Place a tortilla in the skillet and sprinkle shredded cheese on half of the tortilla.
Add chopped Spinach and Golden Delight on top of the cheese.
Fold the tortilla in half to enclose the filling.
Cook for 2-3 minutes or until the tortilla is crispy and the cheese is melted.
Flip the quesadilla and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes or until the other side is crispy.
Cut the quesadillas into wedges and serve hot.
